subject: A figure in dark clothing sits amid shattered wooden debris on a glowing white floor, one hand gripping an overhead beam, expression alarmed
description: A figure in dark clothing sits partially collapsed on a floor that radiates intense white light from below, as though a hole or threshold has opened beneath them. Shattered dark wooden beams and planks surround them on all sides, exploding outward. One hand grips a beam above for balance. Their face shows shock and alarm. One leg wears a turquoise-striped sock or stocking. The color palette is stark: deep black and charcoal for the debris, saturated teal for the walls and ceiling, and a burning white for the floor source. The flatness of the paint style gives it an almost graphic-novel quality.
foreground: shattered wooden debris on glowing white floor
